home.howItWorksSubtitle: From first tap to spotlight — the path every Dynasty challenger walks.
home.kmLoversTitle: They don't just watch — they protect
home.kmLoversDescription: KM DYNASTY LOVERS are the heartbeat of the Dynasty — shielding livestreams, lifting each other, and carrying the culture forward.
home.kmLoversPillars:
Like, share, follow, report — protect the livestream.
Keep esteem high — big box or small, every member matters.
Push forward positively — family energy, even in the hottest battles.
home.kmLoversPerks:
Priority shout-outs during livestreams
Exclusive community giveaways
Winners' Livestream Visit recognition

Get scheduled for a livestream visit

howToJoin.closingBody: Bring your taps, your faith, and your fire. The arena is waiting.

contact.heroLede: Reach the dynasty — business, creator support, or just say hello.

contact.hqDescription: Dual lines across the US and Uganda — La'Gwat Agency.

agency.heroLede: Strategic architects behind the scenes — the pit crew for your rocket ship.
agency.introBody:
To the visionaries, the disruptors, and the culture shifters — the gap between being a creator and building an empire is operational excellence. That is where The A-Team comes in. We are the strategic architects behind the scenes, the pit crew for your rocket ship.

You didn’t build your audience by playing it safe. You grind, you create, and you connect. We aren’t just another management agency. We take the friction out of your business so you can focus entirely on your craft.
agency.scanBody: The A-Team takes on a limited number of creators each quarter — because we invest our full resources into every talent we accept. We are looking for creators who are ready to play the long game.
agency.criteriaText:
Ready to stop being a player and start being the owner
Committed to long-term brand building over short-term virality
Open to strategic guidance and operational systems
Driven to build a community, not just an audience
agency.formSubtitle: Tell us who you are, where you create, and why you’re ready for The A-Team.
agency.oathBody: Limited seats each quarter. Tap apply or scan the code — tell us who you are and what you create.

quotes.reminderBody: Scavengers, Country, Most Beautiful — fill the form. Official Godsent — bring your taps and prayers.

schedule.heroLede: Know when the arena opens. Show up ready.
schedule.finaleBody: Official winners collide in one finale. Win your night — then claim your seat.

outreach.heroSupport: Your need is valid. We are ready to listen, review, and reach out with the support you deserve. Fill in the form and our team will be in touch.
outreach.commitmentBody: King Maker's charity operates across multiple regions, with dedicated support pathways for applicants in the USA, and around the world. Backed by a growing global community, we are transforming digital influence into meaningful, lasting change.
outreach.formSubtitle: Your need is valid. We are ready to listen, review, and reach out with the support you deserve. Fill in the form and our team will be in touch.

giveaway.heroLede: Claim your vault reward when codes drop.
giveaway.vaultSubtitle: Code is announced during King Maker's livestream.
giveaway.steps:
Watch live: King Maker announces the giveaway code during the livestream.
Enter details: Drop the code and your phone number in the claim vault below.
Receive reward: We process claims and deliver airtime or prizes directly.

quotes.quote: New week, same dynasty. Tap with purpose, pray with heart – Godsent sees every effort.
You don't need the biggest box to be a king. Just show up, support, and stay kind.
5000 taps is a promise – to yourself, to the family, to the battle ahead.
Helping the host win co-host battles? That's not teamwork. That's KM blood.
Top seven isn't a rank. It's a mindset – lift others as you rise.
Daily win leads to Sunday. Sunday win leads to Champions. Champions lead with love.
Rest if you must, but never quit. The dynasty keeps going because YOU keep going.

blogPosts.title: Official Box Battle Results — July 12, 2026
blogPosts.excerpt: Another night of intense battles as the Dynasty family showed up and showed out. Here's how it went down.
blogPosts.content:
The Official Godsent Box Battle on July 12th brought together some of the most dedicated members of the KM Dynasty family. The energy was electric from start to finish.

**Winner:** Champion of the night claimed their spot with an incredible display of support and dedication. Over 50,000 taps recorded across the session.

**Highlights:**
- Record-breaking engagement in the first 30 minutes
- Three new members crossed the 5,000 tap threshold
- The Champion of Champions bracket continues to heat up

**What's Next:** The next Official Box Battle is scheduled for July 14th. Make sure you've hit your 5,000 taps and are following King Maker on TikTok.

blogPosts.title: Most Beautiful Box Battle — July 13, 2026
blogPosts.excerpt: The Most Beautiful Box Battle brought grace and glamour to the arena. See who took the crown.
blogPosts.content:
The Most Beautiful Box Battle is always a fan favorite. This edition didn't disappoint.

**Winner:** A stunning performance that left no doubt. The community spoke and the results were clear.

**Top Moments:**
- Incredible energy from all participants
- Community engagement through the roof
- New faces joining the Dynasty family

**Next Battle:** The next Most Beautiful Box Battle is coming soon. Apply through the website form — no tap minimum required.

blogPosts.title: Country Box Battle — The Nations Collide
blogPosts.excerpt: Creators from across the globe came together for the ultimate country showdown.
blogPosts.content:
The Country Box Battle is where national pride meets TikTok talent. This edition featured creators from Nigeria, Uganda, UK, and the US.

**Winner:** Representing their country with pride and taking the victory home.

**Standout Performances:**
- Incredible international representation
- Community rallied behind their favorites
- Cross-border connections made

**Why It Matters:** The Country Box Battle shows that the KM Dynasty family is truly global. We're not just a community — we're a movement.

blogPosts.title: Scavengers Box Battle — Underdogs Rise
blogPosts.excerpt: The Scavengers battle gave new creators their shot. Some serious talent emerged.
blogPosts.content:
The Scavengers Box Battle is designed for new and emerging creators. No tap minimum, no pressure — just pure talent and determination.

**Winner:** A newcomer who proved that you don't need thousands of taps to make an impact.

**Key Takeaways:**
- Fresh faces brought fresh energy
- Community welcomed new members with open arms
- The future of the Dynasty is bright

**Want to Join?** The Scavengers battle is open to everyone. Apply through the Special Battles form on our website.

blogPosts.title: Champion of Champions — The Ultimate Showdown
blogPosts.excerpt: The biggest battle of the month. Only the best of the best compete for the ultimate title.
blogPosts.content:
The Champion of Champions is the pinnacle of KM Dynasty competition. Only battle winners from throughout the month earn the right to compete.

**The Stakes:**
- Winner receives a special feature on KM DYNASTY
- Priority entry into future premium battles
- Recognition as the Dynasty's finest

**The Battle:**
Every competitor brought their A-game. The energy was unmatched, the engagement was through the roof, and the community witnessed history.

**The Champion:** Crowned after an incredible performance that set new records for engagement and support.

**What It Means:** The Champion of Champions isn't just a battle — it's a testament to dedication, consistency, and the unbreakable spirit of the KM Dynasty family.

testimonials.name: Grace
testimonials.text: You showed up when I had lost all hope. I want to say a very big thank you not just for the support, but for seeing me. I was at my lowest, battling with ulcer, struggling to keep my sisters fed and in school, with no parents and no place to truly call home. The support you gave me didn't just help me — it helped my whole family. God will reward you for this.

testimonials.name: diamondprincess
testimonials.text: Since joining KM Dynasty Box Battles, my life has completely changed. I got to 20,000 followers and the income from competing allowed me to get my own apartment, a new iPhone, and my dream streaming setup. I never imagined TikTok could do all of this.

testimonials.name: Caesar
testimonials.text: King, thank you so much for having me in your box. I really appreciate it. I always want to be there and meet my destiny helper.

testimonials.name: Eyram El-shadai
testimonials.text: Good morning boss, thanks so much for giving me the privilege to enter your box for the 2nd time. I really appreciate it. It's so fun being in your box!

testimonials.name: Ark Browser
testimonials.text: I want to say thank you so much for the opportunity to be in your box. I appreciate it so much — it really means a lot to me. I will definitely try it again. Keep up the good work and keep making an impact in so many people's lives.

testimonials.name: Kcee
testimonials.text: Hello, I would like to sincerely thank you for giving me the opportunity to participate in the Box Battle. Yesterday's experience was very valuable and motivating. It helped me grow, gain confidence, and push myself to do better.

faq.question: What services do you offer?
faq.answer: KM DYNASTY and La'Gwat Agency provide creator management, brand development, TikTok livestream coaching, and community-building support for content creators. We specialize in the box battle format and help creators grow their audience and engagement.

faq.question: Who is eligible to join?
faq.answer: Anyone with a TikTok account who wants to be part of the KM DYNASTY community. For creator management services through La'Gwat Agency, eligibility extends to creators in the US and Canada who meet our partnership criteria.

faq.question: How do I get started?
faq.answer: Start by following King Maker on TikTok, joining the KM DYNASTY livestreams, and engaging with the community. For creator management, reach out through the contact page or email lagwatinc@gmail.com.

faq.question: How do you protect creators' accounts?
faq.answer: We never request account passwords or sensitive credentials. All management is done through secure, official TikTok collaboration tools. La'Gwat Agency follows industry-standard data protection practices.

faq.question: What does your creative support include?
faq.answer: Creative support includes content strategy, livestream preparation and coaching, audience engagement techniques, brand identity development, and access to the KM DYNASTY community network for cross-promotion.

faq.question: What kind of technical advice do you provide?
faq.answer: We provide technical guidance on TikTok features, livestream optimization, video quality setup, engagement analytics interpretation, and platform best practices to maximize your reach and retention.

faq.question: How do I book an ad placement?
faq.answer: Visit the Advertise page and fill out the inquiry form with your business details, preferred placement, and budget range. Our team reviews every submission and responds within 48 hours with available options and pricing.

faq.question: What kind of reach can my ad expect?
faq.answer: KM DYNASTY livestreams regularly reach thousands of live viewers, with additional replay and clip engagement. Exact numbers vary by battle type and time slot — share your goals in the inquiry form and we'll recommend the best placement for your budget.

faq.question: Can I sponsor a specific battle or creator?
faq.answer: Yes — the Custom/Bundle package on the Advertise page lets you request a specific battle type, creator shout-out, or bundled placement. Mention your preference in the message field of the inquiry form.

joinSteps.title: Always 5,000 taps and above
joinSteps.body: You must have at least 5,000 total taps on KM DYNASTY content or livestreams to enter any official battle.

joinSteps.title: Support the livestreams
joinSteps.body: Help the host win in occurring co-host battles amid the livestream. Send gifts, cheer, and defend the dynasty. Aim to rank among the top seven active supporters during livestreams. Top seven get priority entry to the box.

joinSteps.title: Elevate creators in the box
joinSteps.body: When other creators join the box (guests), support them with positive comments and shares. Lifting others lifts KM.

joinSteps.title: Be a regular & supportive member
joinSteps.body: Be a regular and supportive member of KM DYNASTY. Consistent presence, positive energy, and loyalty. No drama, no toxicity.

joinSteps.title: Win Daily Godsent Battles
joinSteps.body:
Winning a Daily Godsent Box Battle brings you straight to the Weekly Sunday Official Battle.

KM DYNASTY OFFICIAL BOX BATTLE
Target: 500K
Winner gets: 3 Lions, followers, and a livestream visit
Time: UK & Nigeria – 8:30 PM · USA – 2:30 PM CST & 3:30 PM EST · Uganda – 10:30 PM EAT

joinSteps.title: Win the weekly Official Battle
joinSteps.body: Winning the Sunday Official Battle subsequently takes you to the Champion of the Champions finale.

joinSteps.title: Separate battles via website form
joinSteps.body: The Country and Most Beautiful/Handsome Box Battles are filled independently through the KM DYNASTY website box battle form (link in bio / pinned comment) and Custom.
